greetings online friends
thanks i hate it
absolutely
love my samoas
hope so
making other countries look silly
something something stepping on legos joke
imagine being an accountant for the Jedi
disclaimer.. i haven't tried this yet but it sounds kinda cool
mmm hmm
i'm a fan of edibles
new jack city is the real movie
works for me
ahh.. the egg dream
as is tradition
yes i'm posting this image again
i'm also concerned tbh
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: Beloved dogs in the Roman Empire
item.description:
This is a collection of epitaphs [short texts honoring someone deceased] for best friends in Antiquity. I displayed photos of the stone carvings when avilable, and otherwise Roman mosaics
"Behold the tomb of Aeolis, the cheerful little dog, whose loss to fleeting fate pained me beyond measure." – Tombstone from Gallicano nel Lazio, Italy (AE 1994.348)
"Thou who passest on this path, If haply thou dost mark this monument, Laugh not, I pray thee, though it is a dog's grave. Tears fell for me, and the dust was heaped above me. By a master's hand." – Select Epigrams from the Greek Anthology (1890); LVII
"This is the tomb of the dog, Stephanos, who perished, whom Rhodope shed tears for and buried like a human. I am the dog Stephanos, and Rhodope set up a tomb for me." – Tombstone from Termessos, Turkey; found near Rhodope's own sarcophagus
"This guard of the coaches never barked unsuitably. Now he is silent and his shade protects his ashes." – Tombstone from Ricina, Italy (CIL IX 5785) Note: this may be the full version of an epitaph often misattributed on the web to a Gallic [French] female named Myia, but while Myia is mentioned in the the source book it does not name the male whom "never barked without reason, but now he is silent." – Society and Politics in Ancient Rome (1912); Chapter 9
"In this place lies a little dog after an accomplished life, and sweet honey covers his body [sc. to preserve it?]. His name was Fuscus, and he was eighteen years old. Barely could he move his limbs in his old age..." – Tombstone from Oderzo, Italy (AE 1994.699)
“His owner has buried the dog Parthenope, that he played with, in gratitude for this happiness (Mutual) love is rewarding, like the one for this dog: Having been a friend to my owner, I have deserved this grave. Looking at this, find yourself a worthy friend who is both ready to love while you are still alive and also will care for your body (when you die).” – 2nd-3rd century CE tombstone from Lesbos, Greece; (Inv. No. 411 at Istanbul Archaeology Museums)
"Here the stone says it holds the white dog from Melita, the most faithful guardian of Eumelus. Bull, they called him when he was yet alive, but now, his voice is prisoned in the silent pathways of night." – Select Epigrams from the Greek Anthology (1890); LVIII
"Surely even as thou liest dead in this tomb I deem the wild beasts yet fear thy white bones, huntress Lycas; and thy valour great Pelion knows, and splendid Ossa and the lonely peaks of Cithaeron." – Select Epigrams from the Greek Anthology (1890); LXI
"Bedewed with tears I have carried you, our little dog, as in happier circumstances I did fifteen years ago. So now, Patrice, you will no longer give me a thousand kisses, nor will you be able to lie affectionately round my neck. You were a good dog, and in sorrow I have placed you in a marble tomb, and I have united you forever to myself when I die. You readily matched a human with your clever ways; alas, what a pet we have lost! You, sweet Patrice, were in the habit of joining us at table and fawningly asking for food in our lap, you were accustomed to lick with your greedy tongue the cup which my hands often held for you and regularly to welcome your tired master with wagging tail." – Tombstone from Salerno, Italy (CIL X 00659)
item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.title: The 387th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - DOGS WITH SOUND Edition #4
item.description:
DATA WARNING! ALL VIDEO DUMP!
PRO TIP: They're good dogs, Brant
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #MemeDump #Puppers #Doggos #PuppersAndDoggos #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

item.title: With The Current Ongoing Arctic Event
item.description: Thought this old photo was relevant. Most Viral Edit: You all stay toasty out there. There is a moderate chance of us seeing snow in the AM. I hope it does, my daughter will be so excited. In the meantime, never forget, it's about the cones.
item.dc:creator: itsallaboutthecones

item.title: Picture this: an adventure game where you are a paper ball transforming seamlessly into a paper plane
item.description:
I made a steam page to release my idea to the world, support me with a wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/1617230/Paper_Sky/
Physics works exactly like a real paper plane except you can steer it to keep momentum. Difference in heights and slopes will give you vertical velocity
Paper sky is a dream project of mine, I've always wanted to make a paper plane game that would let you fold your own and fly into high-speed adventures. I'm a solo dev with almost no money to my name, it would really mean the world to me if you could wishlist on Steam (only if you like it and want to see more), this will help a bit with the algorithm and push my game forward!
When you collide into the environment you automatically transform into a paper ball keeping your adventure running
item.dc:creator: Anstabo

item.title: Just found out wife is cheating.
item.description: Just found some risky texts. So many emotions. WTF…. Why…. The lying…. the kids….. I can’t raise them alone…. Can’t sleep…. I’m fucked.
